title: Computer Science TA
description: Assist professor in grading programming assignments, lead lab sessions, and hold office hours to support students in understanding data structures and algorithms.
requiredSkills: Python, Java, Debugging, Communication, Basic Algorithms

title: Math TA (Calculus)
description: Help students with calculus problems, review homework solutions, and conduct weekly recitation sessions. Provide additional support during exam preparation.
requiredSkills: Calculus I & II, Problem-solving, Patience, Tutoring experience, LaTeX

title: Writing Center TA
description: Work with undergraduate students to improve academic writing, provide feedback on essays and research papers, and facilitate small-group writing workshops.
requiredSkills: Academic writing, Grammar, Peer review, Time management, Microsoft Word/Google Docs
